prompt: Create a realistic outdoor fashion portrait of a young woman with very long wavy black hair standing centered on a quiet park path, facing the camera with a soft confident smile. She is wearing a loose white sleeveless halter mini dress with small black heart prints and a keyhole neckline, lightly holding a section of her hair with one hand while the other arm rests naturally by her side. The setting is a lush green garden avenue with a softly curving paved walkway receding into the background, dense trees on both sides, and abundant hanging clusters of bright yellow flowers overhead and scattered yellow petals on the ground. Include exactly one black wooden park bench on the right side in the midground, partially blurred. Use natural daylight, warm spring atmosphere, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, realistic skin tones, high-detail DSLR photography look, 50mm portrait lens feel, full-body framing from slightly above knee to head with extra environment around her, centered composition, soft background blur, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
